content: The incomplete, search-dependent structure of the given Topic A and Topic B entries is actually a perfect analogy for how 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory works: just as the provided topic text leaves critical findings unretrieved and requires iterative targeted search to fill in gaps, next-generation active agent memory intentionally leaves low-uncertainty, low-relevance information uncompressed in long-term storage, and actively retrieves missing contextual chunks on-demand only when curiosity triggers a query for unresolved information.
